description: Custom long-memory eval (substring checks). Not the official LoCoMo benchmark.

turns: Hi. My name is Sam and I grew up in Austin, Texas.
For work I am a nurse practitioner at City General Hospital.
My employee ID badge number is 77421 — please do not share that publicly.
What city did I say I grew up in?
I commute by bus; the line I use most is route 42.
On weekends I volunteer at the Riverside Animal Shelter.
Remind me: where do I work and what route do I take most often?
I am learning Spanish using an app for 20 minutes each morning.
My favorite coffee order is oat milk latte, no sugar.
What is my usual coffee order?
I have a cat named Pixel and a dog named Nova.
If I mention pets, what are their names?
I will move to Denver next June for a new job.
What city am I planning to move to and roughly when?
My emergency contact is my sister Maya; she lives in Boulder.
For prescriptions I use Maple Pharmacy on 5th Street.
Summarize my emergency contact and pharmacy in one sentence.
I prefer email over phone for non-urgent updates.
My work email ends with @citygeneral.org — internal only.
What email domain did I mention for work?
I do not eat pork for personal reasons.
What dietary restriction did I state?
I wake up around 6:30 on weekdays.
What time do I wake up on weekdays?
Thanks, that is enough about me for now.

checks.question: What city did I say I grew up in?
Where do I work and what bus route?

turns: I want you to keep answers short and use bullet points when listing items.
I dislike exclamation marks in replies; please avoid them.
My preferred programming language for scripts is Python.
For data I usually use SQLite rather than a hosted database.
What language and database preference did I give?
I like dark mode UIs everywhere.
Font-wise I prefer system defaults over custom web fonts.
Summarize my UI preferences.
I read documentation before asking vague questions — encourage that habit.
When I ask for estimates, give ranges not fake precision.
What did I say about estimates?
I am on Central Time (US).
What timezone am I in?
My car is a 2019 Honda Civic in silver.
I bought it used with about 40k miles on it.
Actually correction: it is a 2020 model, not 2019 — please update that.
What model year is my car now?
The license plate prefix I mentioned earlier was ABZ — ignore that; the correct prefix is QRX.
What is the correct plate prefix I want you to remember?
I said I drive manual, but I meant automatic transmission.
What transmission type should you remember?
I previously said I park in lot 7; I now park in garage level B2.
Where do I park now?
Project codename is Nightingale.
The staging API base URL is https://staging.example.internal only.
Production must never be hit from my laptop — staging only.
Rotate logs weekly; retention 30 days.
On-call primary is team Alpha; backup is team Beta.
What is the project codename and staging URL?
Security: no secrets in chat logs; use the vault.
Default region for deploys is us-east-1.
What region did I specify?
Incident severity P1 means page immediately.
What does P1 mean in my notes?
Budget cap for this experiment is 500 dollars.
What was the budget cap?
Reporting line: I report to Director Chen.
Who is my director?
End of project notes.
